--- match_coverage_path_variables.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
MATCH p = ANY SHORTEST (a)->(b), shortest = (c), q = TRAIL PATHS (d), edge = (->)
RETURN *

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       15,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Variable: &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 21,
                    NameEnd: 22,
                    Name:    "p",
                  },
                  SearchPrefix: &ast.GQLPathSearchPrefix{
                    StartPos: 25,
                    EndPos:   37,
                    Prefix:   "ANY SHORTEST",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  38,
                          Rparen:  40,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 39,
                              NameEnd: 40,
                              Name:    "a",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  41,
                          EndPos:    43,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  43,
                          Rparen:  45,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 44,
                              NameEnd: 45,
                              Name:    "b",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Variable: &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 48,
                    NameEnd: 56,
                    Name:    "shortest",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  59,
                          Rparen:  61,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 60,
                              NameEnd: 61,
                              Name:    "c",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Variable: &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 64,
                    NameEnd: 65,
                    Name:    "q",
                  },
                  Mode: &ast.GQLPathModeClause{
                    StartPos: 68,
                    EndPos:   79,
                    Mode:     "TRAIL",
                    Suffix:   "PATHS",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  80,
                          Rparen:  82,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 81,
                              NameEnd: 82,
                              Name:    "d",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Variable: &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 85,
                    NameEnd: 89,
                    Name:    "edge",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLSubpathPattern{
                          Lparen: 92,
                          Rparen: 95,
                          Path:   &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                            Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                              &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                                Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                                  StartPos:  93,
                                  EndPos:    95,
                                  Direction: "RIGHT",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 97,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: 104,
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph MATCH p = ANY SHORTEST (a)->(b), shortest = (c), q = TRAIL PATHS (d), edge = (->) RETURN *
